auditor: Chartered Professional Accountants (Mike Chang, CPA, CA - Port Coquitlam)
economic_notes: Nation owns 100% of Skin Tyee Development Ltd. (which holds 100% of Tyeewood Forest Resources Inc.), 80% of Natanlii Developments Ltd., 100% of STFN Resorts Ltd., and 14.18% of Chinook Comfor Limited Partnership. All accounted for by modified equity method. COVID-19 subsequent event noted. Nation provided unlimited guarantee of mortgage on behalf of enterprise entity with balance of $544,583.
notes: Fiscal year is 2020, not 2024. Auditor firm name not clearly stated - partners listed at Port Coquitlam address. Four entities accounted for by modified equity method (GBEs): Skin Tyee Development Ltd. (100%, which also owns Tyeewood Forest Resources Inc.), Natanlii Developments Ltd. (80%), STFN Resorts Ltd. (100%), and Chinook Comfor Limited Partnership (14.18%). Demand loans of $841,594 also outstanding in addition to long-term debt. Cash position is negative (bank indebtedness) at year end. No schedule of remuneration included in the extracted text. Total government transfers estimated as ISC + BC Gaming + CSFS + FNESC + PGNAETA + Province of BC + Health Canada + Social Housing Fund. osr calculated as total revenue minus estimated government transfers.
